response.overview: Presenting OBSCURE – a gripping tale crafted by the multi-talented Veda Vighnesh, who takes on the roles of writer, director, editor, and delivers a chilling performance as the main protagonist. Witness an intense showdown between light and shadow as MeghaShyam delivers an amazing performance as the antagonist, pushing the limits of power and morality.  With stellar supporting performances by Koushik, Prathik, Lokaditya, and Guna, the film explores the depths of human emotions and the complexity of choices. The visual magic is brought to life by the incredible cinematography of Ajay & Veda Vighnesh, whose lens captures the essence of every moment.  Dive into the world of OBSCURE – a story that will leave you questioning reality, truth, and the hidden corners of the human soul.
response.title: OBSCURE - The Movie
